series_metadata.series_description: The Administrative Cost Fund Allocation Information is for the administration of the Workers’ Compensation Insurance System that includes the establishment of premium and assessment rates. These annual assessments are used to fund the operating expenditures of the BWC/IC. The assessments are broken down among the following employer groups: Private employers (PA); Public employers-state agencies (PS); Public employers-counties, taxing districts and hospitals (PC) and Self-Insured employers (SI).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: two (2) fiscal years, and ; Electronic: two (2) fiscal years, and
